description: GTF Vibe Vectors — 12 vibes × 11 axes. Each vibe is a weighted vector. Product scoring = dot product of product axis scores × vibe weights. Replaces vibe_rules_v3.json (binary trigger/exclusion model).

minimalism.scale: 1 = maximalist, heavy, decorated → 10 = ultra-minimal, stripped-back, nothing extra
minimalism.extraction_cue: Count visual elements. Fewer elements = higher score. Solid pattern, clean lines, no embellishment = high. Multiple textures, prints, details = low.

polish.scale: 1 = casual, raw, unfinished → 10 = immaculate finish, every detail considered
polish.extraction_cue: Assess construction quality, fit precision, fabric quality. Sharp seams, clean drape, intentional design = high. Distressed, relaxed, casual = low.

body_awareness.scale: 1 = fully concealing, oversized, no body shape visible → 10 = body-hugging, revealing, skin-showing
body_awareness.extraction_cue: How much does the garment reveal or follow the body? Bodycon, cutout, sheer, fitted = high. Oversized, layered, voluminous = low.

drama.scale: 1 = understated, quiet, no wow-factor → 10 = theatrical, showstopping, look-at-me
drama.extraction_cue: Would this turn heads in a room? Volume, embellishment, unusual proportions, red-carpet energy = high. Quiet, blendable, everyday = low.

novelty.scale: 1 = timeless classic, seen-it-before → 10 = never-seen-before, completely fresh
novelty.extraction_cue: Has this silhouette/detail/combination been done before? Standard blazer = low. Asymmetric deconstructed wrap with mixed fabrics = high.

craft.scale: 1 = machine-made commodity, no visible craftsmanship → 10 = master artisan handwork, heritage technique
craft.extraction_cue: Is there evidence of hand-making, artisanal technique, cultural textile craft? Hand-embroidery, block print, crochet = high. Standard factory construction = low.

boldness.scale: 1 = safe, conventional, plays-it-safe → 10 = daring, provocative, rule-breaking
boldness.extraction_cue: Would the average person hesitate to wear this? Deep V, cutout, bold color, unusual silhouette = high. Classic cuts, safe colors = low.

glamour.scale: 1 = daytime casual, zero shine → 10 = red carpet, full sparkle, maximum embellishment
glamour.extraction_cue: Does it sparkle, shimmer, or embellish? Sequin, metallic, crystal, beading, gold thread = high. Matte, natural, undecorated = low.

trend_currency.scale: 1 = timeless, undateable, could be from any era → 10 = peak trending right now, would get Instagram engagement today
trend_currency.extraction_cue: Is this silhouette/detail/brand currently circulating on social media? Trending cuts, viral brand = high. Classic unchanging = low. NOTE: This axis needs quarterly recalibration.

styling_affordance.scale: 1 = only works one way, single-context piece → 10 = infinite outfit potential, works in every context
styling_affordance.extraction_cue: How many different outfits could this anchor? A black blazer = 10. A sequin floor-length gown = 2. A white tee = 10.

cultural_richness.scale: 1 = generic, placeless, could be from anywhere → 10 = deep heritage technique, regional storytelling, cultural significance
cultural_richness.extraction_cue: Does this garment carry cultural meaning? Block print, heritage weaving, regional embroidery, traditional silhouette with modern interpretation = high. Generic Western fashion = low. NOTE: This is ALWAYS a positive signal, never a penalty.

glam.one_liner: The most memorable person in the room.

cool_girl.one_liner: Got dressed in 5 minutes, looks better than everyone who tried for an hour.

sexy_elegant.one_liner: Powerful, not exposed. The body is celebrated, not objectified.

wedding_guest.one_liner: Best-dressed at the wedding, never upstaging the bride.

dubai_glam.one_liner: Nobu DIFC table energy — bold, luxurious, dripping in intention.
dubai_glam.notes: Traditional/ethnic is NEVER a demotion for Dubai Glam. Cultural richness is a POSITIVE axis here.

elevated_city.one_liner: Dinner reservation after your meeting. Professional polish with personality.

winter_holidays.one_liner: Candlelit dinner party in December — warm, rich, festive without being a costume.

beach_resort.one_liner: Packing for Amalfi — effortless, sun-kissed, slightly more beautiful than daily life.

it_girl.one_liner: Culturally current and instantly noticeable. This vibe updates faster than all others.

soft_demotions.notes: IT Girl has the SOFTEST demotions (-2 cap). Almost anything can be IT Girl if it's trending. This vibe borrows from ALL other vibes.

it_girl.notes: IT Girl is an editorial lens, not a fixed aesthetic. Requires QUARTERLY RECALIBRATION of trend_currency signals. The products that rank highest change as trends shift.

elevated_basics.one_liner: Simple in a way that feels expensive, not boring, sloppy, or overdesigned.
elevated_basics.notes: Merged vibe: Elevated Basics + Hailey Bieber. Hailey is the anchor celebrity. Leather jackets are IN.

unique_finds.one_liner: Discovered, not mass-served. 'Where did you get that?' energy.

soft_demotions.notes: Unique Finds has the SOFTEST demotions tied with IT Girl (-2 cap). Only true commodity basics get demoted. Sequin, streetwear, heritage, glamour can ALL co-exist with Unique Finds if the piece feels authored/discovered.

gtf_brand_alignment: ITRH (craft:7, cultural:8 when embroidery is the story)
unique_finds.notes: No Revolve test data — intentional. Unique Finds is defined by what you DON'T find on mainstream platforms. Cultural richness is a KEY differentiator for GTF vs competitors.

scoring.description: For each product, extract 11 axis scores (1-10). Compute vibe_score = dot_product(product_axes, vibe_vector) / max_possible_score * 100. Apply soft_demotions. Cap at floor_score minimum.
scoring.category_normalization: Rank products WITHIN category first (best top for this vibe vs other tops), then page builder decides category mix.
scoring.inventory_adaptive: When vibe has < 20 live products, reduce demotion_strength by 50% and widen floor_score to 10.
scoring.styling_leverage: Products with high styling_affordance axis score should receive a bonus when appearing as supporting pieces in outfit contexts.

tier_system.tier_1_hero_vibes: These 12 vibes. Full vector scoring, evidence-backed frameworks, dedicated pages.
tier_system.tier_2_modifier_words: Unlimited modifiers (sexy, romantic, Y2K, snatched). Each modifier = temporary axis adjustment applied on top of active vibe. GPT translates modifier to axis deltas.
tier_system.tier_3_hard_attributes: Direct filters (black, midi, silk). Applied after vector scoring. Axes don't change.
tier_system.graduation: When a Tier 2 modifier reaches 500+ clicks with consistent axis patterns, promote to Tier 1 (create new vibe vector). Customers tell us what deserves investment.
